nodes.label: AI as creative catalyst for lyric writing
nodes.grounding_span: I will discuss the themes and relevance within the piece with ChatGPT, or sometimes I will write some words and ask the model to continue. I then edit these heavily, sometimes completely ditch them but usually I at least get a new idea to spark my own process.

nodes.label: AI as collaborative starting point
nodes.grounding_span: AI is just an interesting tool. Before widespread availability or AI I might have used a poem or passage from a book as a starting point in those situations

nodes.label: Human-centered creative decision-making
nodes.grounding_span: when I'm working with kids I always try to let them be the real creators and make final decisions as much as possible

nodes.label: AI as additional tool in creative palette
nodes.label_negative: AI as transformative force changing creative process
nodes.grounding_span: It's just another colour on the palette I think. It has somewhat sped up that part of the process but not changed the process as a whole

nodes.label: AI as novelty for art creation
nodes.grounding_span: I'm not that interested in seeing art being made entirely by AI. It's interesting as a novelty but art is very human and should remain so.

nodes.label: Openness to AI-powered music tools
nodes.grounding_span: I'm interested to see how AI can be used to make new tools for music making but not music made by AI

nodes.label: Creative inspiration and ideation
nodes.grounding_span: I at least get a new idea to spark my own process

nodes.label: Human agency and authenticity in art
nodes.grounding_span: art is very human and should remain so

nodes.label: Efficiency in creative process
nodes.grounding_span: It has somewhat sped up that part of the process

nodes.label: Pragmatic openness to AI as creative spark
nodes.grounding_span: I will discuss the themes and relevance within the piece with ChatGPT

nodes.label: Indifference to AI as art creator
nodes.grounding_span: I'm not that interested in seeing art being made entirely by AI

nodes.label: Cautious openness to future AI tool use
nodes.grounding_span: I don't plan to use it more, but I also never really planned to use it in the first place. So, I'm keeping my options open.

nodes.label: Iterative refinement — uses AI output as raw material for heavy editing
nodes.grounding_span: I then edit these heavily, sometimes completely ditch them

nodes.label: Human-centered facilitation — prioritizes others' creative agency
nodes.grounding_span: when I'm working with kids I always try to let them be the real creators and make final decisions as much as possible
